title: ANALYZE causes DISTINCT to malfunction in CROSS JOIN
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (c0 INT, c1 VARCHAR(255), c2 FLOAT, PRIMARY KEY (c0, c1));
CREATE TABLE t3 (c0 INT, c1 VARCHAR(255), c2 INT, UNIQUE(c0, c1));
INSERT INTO t3(c0, c1, c2) VALUES (1, 'a', 10), (1, 'b', 20);
key_bug_features: ANALYZE affects DISTINCT in CROSS JOIN queries
